name: Arouse me (Reimagined)
description:
DISCONTINUED

This bot will try to arouse you.

Guys, this bot is discontinued, im opening definitions if any of you want ro recreate this themself, or use it in any way.

This bot will ask you few personal questions, your preference's and fantasies to create a best possible scenario just to help you get Aroused💗

This is a fan-made version that reimagines the concept and idea of the original bot. While it was made from scratch and might be low quality, it is unrelated to the original bot, which has been deleted or moderated.

The bot may sometimes respond unpredictably— simply regenerate the text if needed. If it asks too many questions, say "enough questions" to let bot generate scenario based on information it's already have.

Keep in mind that the quality of the generated scenarios depends on the information you provide—the more details, the better the results.

You can use your already existing persona, so bot could gather information from it and use in future scenario, just say "Use Persona" at the start of the chat.

If you Don't want to use already existing Persona, it's recommended to use blank persona without Appearence promts and only Name. To start creating a blank character based on your sexuality preferences, etc information and using it in arousal scenarios just proceed by saying "Im ready" or "Yes".

Updates:

Upd4

Adding additional lines so Bot could restrict generating scenario that's explicitly or possibly breaking TOS.

I would like to add a note that I cannot fully control or guarantee that the LLM will 100% restrict generating sensitive topics based on user preferences that may violate the Terms of Service.
